mapper.insert:
insert into `category`
id, img, name, description, user_id, status_radio, time, role_radio, view_count, collect_count, hot_point,
#{id}, #{img}, #{name}, #{description}, #{userId}, #{statusRadio}, #{time}, #{roleRadio}, #{viewCount}, #{collectCount}, #{hotPoint},
mapper.update:
update `category`
img = #{img},
name = #{name},
description = #{description},
user_id = #{userId},
status_radio = #{statusRadio},
time = #{time},
role_radio = #{roleRadio},
view_count = #{viewCount},
collect_count = #{collectCount},
hot_point = #{hotPoint},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select category.*, user.name as userName from category left join user on category.user_id = user.id
and category.id = #{id} and category.img like concat('%', #{img}, '%') and category.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') and category.user_id = #{userId} and user.name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') and category.status_radio like concat('%', #{statusRadio}, '%') and category.time like concat('%', #{time}, '%') and category.role_radio like concat('%', #{roleRadio}, '%')
order by hot_point desc, view_count desc, collect_count desc
